routes.label: Debugging/root-cause
routes.summary: reproduce first, form 3+ competing hypotheses, gather evidence per hypothesis, trace the full causal chain, verify before/after, and report the hypotheses you rejected.

routes.label: Render/executable artifact
routes.summary: grounding loop: run it in the real renderer, observe the actual output, fix what the observation reveals, then re-run. A static check is not observation.

routes.label: Decision/design
routes.summary: Orient, Inspect, Decide, Act, Verify, Report; record what you checked and why at each step.

routes.label: Domain verification
routes.summary: Use the failable-check recipes for this domain (software / research / data): every acceptance criterion needs a check that can fail.

routes.label: Delegating
routes.summary: Use the brief template: objective, context, constraints (incl. 'Do not touch: protected tests'), strict output contract, and the verification the worker must run.
